name: AEO Content Engine v7.0 - 31st March 2026 - Two-Model Pipeline

parameters.content:
# AEO Content Engine v5.0

**Two AI Models Working Together:**
- **GPT-4.1** → Keyword strategy + Content writing + AEO editing
- **Gemini 2.5 Flash** → Deep research & trend analysis

**Keyword Research (FREE):**
- Google Autocomplete API (unlimited, no key)
- Serper.dev (2,500 free searches, no credit card)

**Pipeline:**
1. Google Autocomplete + Serper.dev → GPT-4.1 keyword strategy
2. RSS feeds → Gemini deep research
3. GPT writes article → GPT-4.1 optimizes for AEO
4. GPT writes newsletter + video scripts
5. Send 3 SEPARATE branded emails (Article, Newsletter, Scripts)

**3 Credentials Needed:**
1. Serper.dev API Key (serper.dev — FREE 2,500 searches)
2. OpenAI API (platform.openai.com)
3. Google Gemini API (ai.google.dev)
4. SMTP (Gmail App Password)

**Customize per client:**
- Client Configuration node (all settings + branding)
- RSS Feed Sources node (swap URLs)
- Duplicate workflow per client

# SETUP GUIDE

## Step 1: Serper.dev (FREE — 2,500 searches)
1. Go to serper.dev → Sign up (no credit card)
2. Copy your API key from the dashboard
3. In n8n: Credentials → New → Header Auth
4. Name: X-API-KEY
5. Value: paste your Serper API key
6. Save as "Serper.dev API Key"
7. Update the 'Serper - SERP + PAA' node credential

## Step 2: OpenAI API (GPT-4.1)
1. Go to platform.openai.com → API Keys
2. Create a new API key
3. In n8n: Credentials → New → OpenAI API
4. Paste your API key → Save
5. Update all five GPT nodes

## Step 3: Google Gemini API
1. Go to ai.google.dev → Get API Key
2. Create key in Google Cloud project
3. In n8n: Credentials → New → Google PaLM API
4. Paste your API key → Save
5. Update both Gemini nodes

## Step 4: SMTP (Gmail)
1. Enable 2FA on your Google Account
2. Google Account → Security → App Passwords
3. Generate an App Password for 'Mail'
4. In n8n: Credentials → New → SMTP
5. Host: smtp.gmail.com | Port: 465 | SSL: Yes
6. User: your@gmail.com | Pass: app password

## Step 5: Client Configuration
- Open the 'Client Configuration' node
- Update ALL fields for your client
- Update 'RSS Feed Sources' with client's feeds

## Step 6: Test & Activate
- Click 'Test Workflow' to run once
- Check email output
- If good → toggle Active

# UPGRADE TO PAID APIs

This workflow uses FREE APIs by default.
When ready, you can upgrade for richer data:

## Option A: DataForSEO ($50 deposit, pay-per-query)
Replaces: Autocomplete + Serper nodes
Gives you: Exact search volume, keyword difficulty,
CPC, competition scores, AI Overview detection
- Sign up: dataforseo.com
- Auth: HTTP Basic Auth (email + API password)
- Replace the 3 keyword nodes with:
  POST dataforseo.com/v3/dataforseo_labs/google/
  related_keywords/live
  POST .../keyword_suggestions/live
  POST .../serp/google/organic/live/regular
- Cost: ~$0.002/query live, ~$0.0006 standard

## Option B: SerpAPI ($75/mo for 5,000 searches)
Replaces: Serper node
Gives you: Google Trends data + SERP
- n8n has a built-in SerpAPI node
- engine=google_trends for trending topics
- engine=google for SERP + PAA

## Option C: SEMrush ($500/mo Business plan)
Replaces: All keyword nodes
Gives you: Industry-leading keyword database
- Use HTTP Request with SEMrush API
- Best for agencies with 10+ clients

## Option D: Ahrefs (via RapidAPI)
Replaces: Keyword Suggestions node
Gives you: Keyword explorer + backlink data
- Available on RapidAPI marketplace
- Use HTTP Request node

## Google Search Console (FREE, own sites only)
ADD alongside existing nodes (don't replace):
- n8n has built-in Google Search Console node
- Shows real clicks, impressions, CTR, position
- Great for tracking AEO performance over time
- Requires site verification in Search Console

## Phase 1: Keyword Research (FREE)
Google Autocomplete (no key) + Serper.dev (2,500 free) → GPT-4.1

## Phase 2: RSS + Gemini Deep Research
Fetch industry feeds → Gemini 2.5 Flash analysis

## Phase 3: Content Generation
GPT-4.1 writes → GPT-4.1 AEO edits article

## Phase 4: Separate Email Delivery
4 branded emails sent separately:
1. AEO Article (full content + HTML/DOCX attachments for CMS)
2. Newsletter Digest (categorized stories)
3. Video Scripts (short + long form)
4. Instructions (step-by-step publishing guide)

parameters.jsonOutput:
{
  "industry": "Your Industry",
  "targetAudience": "Your Target Audience",
  "brandName": "Your Brand Weekly Digest",
  "tone": "Sharp, specific, no-nonsense. Write like a senior tech journalist at The Information or Ars Technica - not a corporate blog. Lead with concrete facts, name specific companies and products, cite real numbers. Zero corporate buzzwords. If you catch yourself writing leverage, synergy, cutting-edge, innovative, game-changing, revolutionize, or harness the power of - delete the sentence.",
  "keywords": "keyword1, keyword2, keyword3, keyword4, keyword5",
  "recipientEmail": "your-client@example.com",
  "senderEmail": "your-sender@example.com",
  "avoidTopics": "politics, religion, controversial opinions",
  "logoUrl": "https://your-logo-url.com/logo.png",
  "brandColor": "#6366f1",
  "brandColor_HELP": "Your main brand color. Used for links, buttons, and email header. Just enter the ONE color that represents the brand.",
  "headerDarkColor": "#1a1a2e",
  "headerDarkColor_HELP": "Dark background behind the logo in the email header. Leave as #1a1a2e (dark navy) if unsure. Works with any brand color.",
  "highlightColor": "#f59e0b",
  "highlightColor_HELP": "Color for category tags and small accents. Can be same as brandColor, or a complementary tone like gold or orange.",
  "fontFamily": "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif",
  "websiteUrl": "https://your-website.com/",
  "articleBaseUrl": "https://your-website.com/blog/"
}

options.instructions: You are an elite SEO/AEO strategist. You analyze Google Autocomplete trends, SERP data, People Also Ask questions, and related searches to create precise content briefs optimized for AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity). PAA questions are your most valuable signal — they show exactly what AI engines surface. Return valid JSON only.

You are a world-class AEO content writer. You write data-driven articles optimized for AI answer engines AND traditional search. Every sentence earns its place. No filler. All content must reference 2026 data only. Never use 2024 or 2025 dates. Return clean HTML.

values.content:
=# AEO OPTIMIZATION REVIEW

## TODAY'S DATE: {{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}

CRITICAL: Verify ALL dates in the article are 2026. Fix or remove any 2024/2025 references.

## Keywords
- Primary: {{ $('Parse Strategy').first().json.keywordStrategy.primaryKeyword }}
- Secondary: {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Strategy').first().json.keywordStrategy.secondaryKeywords) }}

## Article to Optimize
{{ $json.articleHtml }}

## SCORING CHECKLIST — Score each criterion 0-20 points (100 total). Be HONEST, every article is different.
1. DIRECT ANSWER (0-20): Does the opening directly answer the core question in 2-3 clear sentences?
2. DATA RICHNESS (0-20): Are takeaways specific with real 2026 numbers, stats, or expert quotes?
3. QUESTION HEADINGS (0-20): Do H2/H3 match natural questions AI engines actually surface?
4. KEYWORD INTEGRATION (0-20): Is primary keyword in title, first paragraph, 2+ H2s, and conclusion?
5. FAQ QUALITY (0-20): Are FAQ answers specific, useful, and directly quotable by AI?

Add up your scores honestly. The total WILL be different for every article. NEVER default to 85.

## OUTPUT
Return OPTIMIZED article HTML. Preserve CSS classes. Make REAL targeted improvements based on THIS article's specific weaknesses. Every article needs DIFFERENT optimizations. Keep 800-1000 words.

After HTML add:
|||META|||
{"title":"optimized title","slug":"url-slug","excerpt":"2 sentence excerpt","primaryKeyword":"kw","wordCount":900,"aeoScore":0,"optimizations":["describe each SPECIFIC change you made to THIS article - must be different every time"]}

IMPORTANT: Replace aeoScore 0 with YOUR calculated total from the 5 criteria above. Each article WILL score differently. List SPECIFIC optimizations you actually performed.

options.instructions: You are a senior AEO editor. Make targeted improvements to maximize AI answer engine visibility. Verify all dates are 2026 - remove any 2024/2025 references. Calculate AEO score HONESTLY per article using the 5 criteria - never default to 85. List SPECIFIC optimizations you made. Surgical edits only. Return clean HTML.
You are an expert newsletter copywriter. Write concise, engaging story summaries with inline CSS for email. Use real URLs. Output clean HTML content only.
You are an expert video script writer for social media and YouTube. Write viral, retention-optimized scripts. Conversational but professional. Output clean HTML only.

parameters.content:
## Deduplication System (Auto)

This workflow automatically tracks content history to prevent duplicates:

**How it works:**
1. Each run saves: keywords, article title, story URLs, angles
2. Next run filters out previously used stories from RSS
3. GPT is told to avoid previously used keywords & angles
4. Keeps last 52 entries (1 year of weekly runs)

**Storage:** n8n Workflow Static Data (built-in, no external DB)

**To reset history:** Run the 'RESET History (Manual)' node
by itself (click Test on just that node). This clears all
history so the next run starts completely fresh.

**Nodes involved:**
- Merge Keyword Data (loads history)
- Parse Research (filters duplicate stories)
- Save Content History (records after send)
- All GPT prompts (exclusion instructions)
